eas_text: A civil authority has issued A HAZARDOUS MATERIALS WARNING for the following counties or areas: Grady, OK; at 05:17 PM ON JAN 29, 2026 Effective until 06:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: At 4:42 pm on January 29, 2026, a pipline hazard was reported in the Naples area near Blanchard in Grady County. A voluntary evacuation is in place. Evacuate NOW. Persons located between CS 1330 and 1350 and 2990 and 2960 Roads are requested to evacuate west on Highway 62 and South on CS 2940 to the New Beginners Church in Blanchard, located at 2396 County Street 2940, Blanchard, OK 73010.
